generic.en: That's what you get for being so stinky!

boatrace_start_throwable_deploykit.en: Does it HAVE to go in the water?

generic.en: Not my idea of "feeling the burn".
generic.trans: 不是我理解的 "感受燃烧"。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.en: There's not nearly enough fire in those lanterns.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.trans: 这些灯笼里的火远远不够。

quagmire_spotspice_sprig.en: It's a piece of that pepper-y bush.
quagmire_spotspice_sprig.trans: 那种胡椒味灌木丛的一根小枝。

pigtorch.en: These pigs sure know how to have a good time.

boatrace_primemate.trans: 那东西最好别给我作弊。

book_research_station.en: How would everything even fit in there?
book_research_station.trans: 那里面能放下这么多东西？

corn_cooked.en: Ooh, this one explodes when it goes in fire!
corn_cooked.trans: 哦，这东西丢进火里会爆！

haunted_ground.en: I don't want to mess with that.
haunted_ground.trans: 我不想跟那扯上任何关系。

level3.en: Yeah sure, it's floating now, why not.
level3.trans: 当然了，它现在还浮起来了，为什么不呢。

generic.en: Looks flammable.

haunted_pocket.en: It's burning a hole in my pocket. Heh.

kitcoon_desert.trans: 你不仅个子小，而且吱吱作响。

ghost.en: Don't cry, %s, I'm getting you a heart.

attacker.en: Hey %s, you're not venomous, are you?

generic.en: Hi %s!

klaussackkey.en: Ha! I wouldn't wanna get smacked with that thing!
klaussackkey.trans: 哈！我不会想被那东西掴一掌！

wintersfeastfuel.en: Reminds me of sitting by the fire on cold winter nights.
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 让我想起在冬夜里烤火的时候。

slingshotammo_gold.en: Ever considered making your ammo a little more flammable?
slingshotammo_gold.trans: 有没有考虑过让你的弹药更易燃一点？

generic.en: Yuck. It smells like sulfur.
generic.trans: 真讨厌。 它闻起来像硫磺。

has_item.en: I'm not sure how to feel about non-flammable furniture.
has_item.trans: 我不知道该如何看待不易燃的家具。

generic.en: I'm not sure how to feel about non-flammable furniture.
generic.trans: 我不知道该如何看待不易燃的家具。

wall_ruins_2.en: And they'll huff and they'll puff!

flowerhat.en: A halo of flowers. Too bad it's not a burning halo of flowers.
flowerhat.trans: 花环。可惜不是正在燃烧的花环。

quagmire_rubble_clocktower.en: That would look better on fire.
quagmire_rubble_clocktower.trans: 它着火之后会好看得多。

standing.en: Gross! I told you we shoulda burned it!
standing.trans: 恶心！我告诉过你我们应该把它烧掉！

sitting.en: What's a weird table doing out here? Let's burn it!
sitting.trans: 把那么诡异的桌子放在那边做什么？我们把它烧掉吧！

oceanfishingbobber_oval.en: How am I supposed to burn it when it's in the water?
oceanfishingbobber_oval.trans: 它在水里，我该如何烧掉它？

skeleton.en: I hope you at least went out in a blaze of glory.
skeleton.trans: 我希望你至少是在荣耀的火焰中死去的。

chesspiece_hornucopia.en: Ouchhh! I think I chipped a tooth.
chesspiece_hornucopia.trans: 哎哟！我想我咬碎了一颗牙齿。

chesspiece_clayhound.trans: 它看起来很友好的样子。

shroomcake.trans: 终归是蛋糕，给我递过来吧。

potato_seeds.en: It's just a bunch of seeds.

hermitcrab_relocation_kit.en: What's the big deal where she lives?
hermitcrab_relocation_kit.trans: 她住哪儿有什么重要的？

battlesong_instant_taunt.en: Heh. Okay, I'm using that one.

carnivaldecor_lamp.en: It makes light, but no fire. Creepy.
carnivaldecor_lamp.trans: 它能发光，但没有火。令人毛骨悚然。

halloweencandy_14.en: Mmm! It burns my mouth so good!

goldenshovel.en: It won't make flaming pits, but at least it's shiny.
goldenshovel.trans: 虽然它没法用来挖火坑，但至少它会闪闪发光。

plantmeat_cooked.trans: 火可以让一切东西变得更好。

target_too_far_away.en: Don't think his nose can sniff that far.
target_too_far_away.trans: 他的鼻子应该闻不到那么远的东西。

lost_track.en: Drat, looks like someone beat me to it.
lost_track.trans: 糟糕，看来有人抢先我一步。

nothing_to_track.en: Looks like he's not findin' anything.

nearby.en: There's a kitcoon around here, I can feel it...
nearby.trans: 附近有一只小浣猫，我能感觉到……

tracking.trans: 看起来他有了新的发现！

generic.en: What a fancy, tired looking catcoon. Maybe he's a businessman.
generic.trans: 穿着高级服装却一脸疲倦的浣猫。也许他是个商人。

feather_crow.en: Black bird feather. It probably smells terrible on fire.
feather_crow.trans: 黑鸟的羽毛。烧着了应该很难闻。

generic.en: Alright, what festive goodies can we get from ya?
generic.trans: 大过节的，你不打算给我点什么好东西吗？

empty.en: You're askin' for donations now?

halloweencandy_11.en: I'm gonna need about a dozen of these.
halloweencandy_11.trans: 我大概需要一打的这些东西。

redmooneye.en: This one's got fire in its eye!
redmooneye.trans: 这家伙眼睛里冒着火焰！

wereitem_beaver.en: He wouldn't mind if I use this for kindling, right?
wereitem_beaver.trans: 我要是把它点着，他不会介意吧？

lordfruitfly.en: You think you can barge in here and mess up the garden? That's my job!
lordfruitfly.trans: 你以为你能闯进这里把花园搞得一团糟？那是我的工作！

boat_rotator.en: Hehehe, let's see how fast we can spin without getting sick!
boat_rotator.trans: 呵呵呵，那就看看我们能转多快还不头晕！

wrong_tile.en: I don't think it likes this type of dirt.
wrong_tile.trans: 我觉得它并不喜欢这种土。

wrong_season.en: What's wrong? Is it too cold out? Too hot?
wrong_season.trans: 怎么了？室外太冷了吗？太热了？

generic.en: It's almost a tree.

spear_wathgrithr_lightning.en: Zapping is almost as fun as burning.
spear_wathgrithr_lightning.trans: 电击几乎和火烧一样有趣。

generic.en: They're pretty cute.

wx78module_movespeed2.en: Hey WX, when are you gonna install a flamethrower?
wx78module_movespeed2.trans: 我说WX，你啥时候装火焰喷射器啊？

wx78module_light.en: Hey WX, when are you gonna install a flamethrower?
wx78module_light.trans: 我说WX，你啥时候装火焰喷射器啊？

hedgehound.trans: 呃，你这个鬼鬼祟祟的混蛋！！

general.en: Everything looks better in the firelight.
general.trans: 什么东西只要被火光照到就好看不少。

out.en: Looks like it needs some more fire!
out.trans: 它看起来似乎需要点把火！

general.en: Everything looks better in the firelight.
general.trans: 什么东西只要被火光照到就好看不少。

out.en: Looks like it needs some more fire!
out.trans: 它看起来似乎需要点把火！

mulleddrink.en: Ahh, it's like there's a warm fire in my belly.
mulleddrink.trans: 感觉就像肚子里有一团温暖的火焰。

statueharp.en: Such a nice statue. Shame if something were to happen to it.
statueharp.trans: 多么漂亮的雕像。弄坏了就可惜了。

fishmeat_dried.trans: 一股鱼腥味，大大的鱼腥味。

pumpkincarver.trans: 谁会是那颗幸运的南瓜呢？

withered.en: Pfft, it's barely even hot out.
withered.trans: 噗，外面根本不热啊，怎么就蔫了。

generic.en: It's a fruit bush of some sort.

barren.en: It's not going to grow fruit anymore.

escaped.en: Stupid fish!! You're not supposed to get away!
escaped.trans: 愚蠢的鱼！！你不应该逃跑的！

lowered.en: I bet it's catching lots of fish right now.
lowered.trans: 我敢打赌，它现在正在抓很多的鱼。

generic.en: It does all the work for me!
generic.trans: 它替我搞定了所有麻烦事！

generic.en: I think a fire is trying to escape.
generic.trans: 我感觉有火焰想要逃出来。

lavaarena_armorheavy.trans: 那个盔甲看起来很安全。

picked.en: Maybe it will return some day.
picked.trans: 也许有一天它会再长回来。

generic.en: Dumb mushroom.

antlionhat.en: Pfft, what a dumb-looking hat. I love it.
antlionhat.trans: 噗，这帽子看着傻傻的。我简直爱了。

blue_cap.en: It smells like a gym sock!
blue_cap.trans: 一股运动后的臭袜子的味道！

wetgoop.en: How did it go wrong?! It was engulfed in fire and everything.
wetgoop.trans: 怎么会出错呢？！它明明在火里，而且我做了一切该做的事。

monkeyisland_portal.en: Um, should I be worried about that?

yots_lantern_post_item.en: I can burn it as is.
yots_lantern_post_item.trans: 我可以就这样直接烧掉它。

wx78module_maxhunger1.en: Hey WX, when are you gonna install a flamethrower?
wx78module_maxhunger1.trans: 我说WX，你啥时候装火焰喷射器啊？

drying_notmeat.en: How long does it take this stuff to dry?!

abandoned.en: That's too bad. Time to burn it!

done.en: Hey lady, your stuff's all dry!
done.trans: 喂，女士，你的东西都干透了！

burnt.en: Maybe the fire wasn't the best drying method...
burnt.trans: 也许火不是把肉弄干的最好方法...

generic.en: Nice, but burning still beats drying.
generic.trans: 不错，但烧掉比晒干更好。

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.en: Alternatively, I could just set the mast on fire.
mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.trans: 我也可以直接把桅杆烧了。

generic.en: But how will anything burn?

trap_teeth_maxwell.en: I know exactly what kind of jerk leaves this lying around!
trap_teeth_maxwell.trans: 我完全知道什么样的混蛋会在地上放这东西！

quagmire_pot.en: I should light a fire under its butt.
quagmire_pot.trans: 我应该在它屁股底下点火。

slurper.en: Do they have little fires in their bellies?

ocean_trawler_kit.en: Maybe I can bribe one of the kids to build it for me.
ocean_trawler_kit.trans: 也许我可以贿赂一个孩子为我建造它。

saltrock.trans: 我想知道它能不能燃烧。

starving.en: Okay, okay! I get it, you're hungry.
starving.trans: 好吧，好吧！我知道了，你饿了。

generic.en: Not quite a phoenix, but still cute. I guess.
generic.trans: 我觉得吧，虽然不太像凤凰，但还是很可爱。

mask_blacksmithhat.trans: 让人起鸡皮疙瘩的面具。

wx78module_movespeed.en: Hey WX, when are you gonna install a flamethrower?
wx78module_movespeed.trans: 我说WX，你啥时候装火焰喷射器啊？

yotd_anchor.en: It better be the only thing going into the water today.
yotd_anchor.trans: 最好是今天唯一下水的东西。

salty_dog.trans: 好吧好吧，你还挺可爱的。

spear_gungnir.en: I don't want to use that.

spice_chili.en: I like the way it sets my mouth on fire.
spice_chili.trans: 我喜欢嘴巴这种火辣辣的感觉。

wetpaper.en: I can think of a real quick way to dry it.
wetpaper.trans: 我能想到一个快速弄干它的办法。

burnt.en: What's burned is burned, no point thinking about it too much, right?
burnt.trans: 烧就烧了，没必要想太多，对不？

generic.en: Hey, uh... what library did Ms. Wickerbottom work at, anyway?
generic.trans: 那啥，薇克巴顿女士以前在哪上班来着？

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.en: I guess building some bumpers is better than sinking.
boat_bumper_yotd_kit.trans: 我想建造一些保险杠总比沉没好。

dumbbell_heat.en: Let's get you all fired up for your workout, big guy!
dumbbell_heat.trans: 让我们为您的锻炼热热身，大家伙！

slingshot_frame_gems.en: That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning.
slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 那小孩对打弹弓的热爱简直都赶上我对纵火的痴迷了。

kitcoon_moon.trans: 你不仅个子小，而且吱吱作响。

pudgy.en: You need to burn some calories.

mypartner.en: It may be a dumb stinky beast, but it's my dumb stinky beast!
mypartner.trans: 就算它是一只又笨又臭的野兽，那也是我的又笨又臭的野兽!

ornery.en: I can see fire in its eyes.
ornery.trans: 我在它的眼睛里可以看到火焰！

dead_mypartner.en: Don't you die on me, you walking hamburger!
dead_mypartner.trans: 你竟敢死了，你这个行走的汉堡包！

dead.en: Come on, get up! What's the matter? Oh...

domesticated.en: It's lost the fire from its heart.

naked.trans: 哈！他身上一根毛也没有了！

sleeping.en: They look even dumber when they're sleeping.
sleeping.trans: 它们睡着的时候样子更傻。

generic.en: What a disgusting, hairy beast!
I've uh... never actually been to a carnival before. Do I give it something?
generic.trans: 我呃……从来没到嘉年华玩过。我是要给它个什么东西吗？

bird_mutant_spitter.en: Oh yeah?! Two can play at that game... PTOOEY!
bird_mutant_spitter.trans: 哦是吗？！这游戏完全可以两个人玩……我啐！

dustmoth.en: They just clean all day? What a boring life.
dustmoth.trans: 它们只是整天打扫卫生？真是无聊的生活。

greenstaff.en: It won't start a fire but I guess it's still useful.
greenstaff.trans: 虽然它没法用来生火，但我猜它还是很有用。

generic.en: Yeeaahh, I don't think I want anything in there THAT bad.
generic.trans: 哎呀，其实我并不是特别想要里面的东西。

pumpkin_cooked.en: Fire on the outside turned out pretty well.
pumpkin_cooked.trans: 在外面用火烤出来的东西真的挺不错的。

voltgoatjelly.en: HEY WARLY! Can I eat this?

generic.en: I wouldn't burn it while someone lives there.
generic.trans: 有东西住在那里时，我是不会烧掉它的。

empty.en: It's all dried up and ready for burning.
empty.trans: 它已经完全干枯了，可以烧了。

costume_fool_body.en: They can't ban you from the theater if you're part of the cast!
costume_fool_body.trans: 一旦成为演员后，就没有人能禁止你进入剧院了！

battlesong_sanitygain.trans: 快看，多么高级的小火花！

wathgrithr_improvedhat.en: I don't think I could pull it off like she does.

tallbird.en: I don't think it wants to be friends.
tallbird.trans: 我觉得它不想和我交朋友。

greengem.trans: 这个宝石感觉真的好亮。

battlesong_healthgain.trans: 快看，多么高级的小火花！

oceantree_pillar.en: Hey, it's gonna stop the sun from burning things!
oceantree_pillar.trans: 嘿，它会阻止太阳把东西点燃！

ghost.en: I think he's actually having fun.

firestarter.trans: 现在是谁“不懂消防安全”了，%s？

attacker.en: That goody-goody finally snapped!
attacker.trans: 那个乖巧的家伙终于发飙了！

reviver.en: Alright, I'm sorry for calling you a goody-goody.
reviver.trans: 好吧，我不该叫你叫乖巧的家伙。

generic.en: Hi %s!
What's all this stuff for?
generic.trans: 这些东西是做什么用的？

burnt.en: Hahaha-! Uh, I mean, oh no...
burnt.trans: 哈哈哈！额，我的意思是，哦，不……

moonglass_wobster_den.en: We should try smoking them out.
moonglass_wobster_den.trans: 我们可以试试用烟熏它们出来。

record_creepyforest.en: It's always nice to have some music while you're busy burning stuff.
record_creepyforest.trans: 忙着烧东烧西的时候，播点音乐是很有感觉的。

armor_lunarplant.trans: 只有穿在我身上它才好看。

waterplant_baby.en: It's small now, but it'll get bigger.
waterplant_baby.trans: 现在很小，但会越来越大。

unagi.en: You can make it fancy but it's still an eel.
unagi.trans: 你可以把它做得很漂亮，但它还是鳗鱼。

yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.en: Let's see, where's a good spot for me to win?
yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.trans: 来看看，哪个好位置容易让我赢？

slingshot_frame_bone.en: That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning.
slingshot_frame_bone.trans: 那小孩对打弹弓的热爱简直都赶上我对纵火的痴迷了。

boat_bumper_shell_kit.en: I guess building some bumpers is better than sinking.
boat_bumper_shell_kit.trans: 我想建造一些保险杠总比沉没好。

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: Aw come on, I've got to set it up myself?
carnivalgame_memory_kit.trans: 拜托，还指望我亲自装啊？

slingshotammo_rock.en: Ever considered making your ammo a little more flammable?
slingshotammo_rock.trans: 有没有考虑过让你的弹药更易燃一点？

watermelonhat.en: Well, that's one use for this fruit.
watermelonhat.trans: 好吧，这是这种水果的用途之一。

succulent_plant.trans: 它是一个未燃烧过的小植物。

slingshot_handle_sticky.en: That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning.
slingshot_handle_sticky.trans: 那小孩对打弹弓的热爱简直都赶上我对纵火的痴迷了。

generic.en: What a sorry looking piece of... grass?

strawhat.en: A hat made of straw. To think, it could've been tinder.
strawhat.trans: 一顶稻草做的帽子。但是我觉得，它本来可以成为引火物的。

monkeytail.en: It'll look so pretty when it's on fire.
monkeytail.trans: 点着了以后一定会很漂亮。

generic.en: Go on, get the fishy!
I wanna kick it!
Haha oh man, who drew THAT?
generic.trans: 哈哈哦天啊，谁画了那玩意？

cutless.en: At least it'll make good firewood.
cutless.trans: 至少它可以做很好的柴火。

blowdart_pipe.en: Good practice for blowing into a fire.
blowdart_pipe.trans: 练好这个，给火吹风就不费劲了。

generic.en: Got any firecrackers?

empty.en: Guess I should give it something.

rabbitking_aggressive.en: You have some real issues, buddy.

record_drstyle.en: There's something so nostalgic about the way it pops and crackles.
record_drstyle.trans: 它爆裂和噼啪作响的方式是如此怀旧。

quagmire_bowl_silver.en: Now I don't have to use my hands.

skeletonhat.en: I've got a headache just looking at it.

mutator_hider.en: Give one to Wilson, I'm sure he'd loooove to try it! Heheh.
mutator_hider.trans: 给威尔逊一个吧，我相信他一定很想试试！嘿嘿。

undrawn.en: My burning desire isn't to draw.
undrawn.trans: 我燃烧的欲望不是画画。

generic.en: It's fine.

ghost.en: I better get a heart for %s.

firestarter.en: Are we lighting fires?! I want in!
firestarter.trans: 我们要点火吗？我想加入！

attacker.en: Better cool it before you blow a gasket, %s!

generic.en: Hi %s!

watermelon_seeds.en: I could grow them, but that sounds boring.
watermelon_seeds.trans: 我可以种它们，但那听起来很无聊。

moon_altar_cosmic.en: Why do I get the feeling we aren't done yet?
moon_altar_cosmic.trans: 为什么我感觉这还没完？

eyeturret.en: I wish it lit stuff on fire.
eyeturret.trans: 我希望它能让东西点燃。

generic.en: It's like floating fire!

formal_blueprint.en: Ugh, it looks so stuffy and proper.

beefalohat.en: Beast hair to go over people hair!
beefalohat.trans: 野兽毛发变成人类头发！

bombed.en: The bombs are fun to throw in.
bombed.trans: 扔沐浴球进去会很好玩。

generic.en: So toasty and warm!

empty.en: What's better than a hotspring? A fire pit!
empty.trans: 还有什么能比温泉好？当然是火坑！

sewing_tape.en: At least something around here can hold it together.
sewing_tape.trans: 至少附近有东西可以把它固定起来。

dragonboat_pack.en: All the boat junk you could ever need in one package.
dragonboat_pack.trans: 你能用的上的那些船垃圾都在这一个包里了。

fence_gate.en: I guess we could pen stuff in with it.
fence_gate.trans: 我猜我们可以用它把东西关起来。

marblebean.en: I guess we just... plant it? In the dirt?
marblebean.trans: 我看就把它栽种一下？在泥土里？

playbill_the_princess_yoth.en: For some reason, I can relate to the main character.
playbill_the_princess_yoth.trans: 不知道为什么，我还挺能共情主角的。

oceanvine_cocoon_burnt.trans: 想重新装潢的话，用火是最快的。

mutator_moon.en: Give one to Wilson, I'm sure he'd loooove to try it! Heheh.
mutator_moon.trans: 给威尔逊一个吧，我相信他一定很想试试！嘿嘿。

ice_blueprint.en: Don't beefalo already have hairy winter coats?
ice_blueprint.trans: 皮弗娄牛不是已经有了御寒的长毛了吗？

statue.en: Welp, that's a weird shape for a rock.
statue.trans: 好吧，这石头的形状太怪了。

generic.en: This dog is stone cold!
generic.trans: 这只狗像石头一样冰冷！

sleeping.en: Maybe I should just leave that one alone.
sleeping.trans: 也许我不应该去打扰那家伙。

generic.en: Maybe I could kill it... with FIRE.
generic.trans: 也许我可以...用火烧死它。

potato_cooked.en: Cooking just means sticking stuff in fire.
potato_cooked.trans: 烹饪就是把东西塞进火里。

generic.en: Ooooh, prizes!

boat_item.en: That's the boat part of the boat.

garlic.en: It's just a couple cloves of garlic.

moon_altar_rock_idol.en: Something inside is calling for me.

generic.en: Ew, I think it's whispering to me.
generic.trans: 我猜它在跟我说悄悄话！

nolight.en: Iunno, maybe we can jam stuff in it.

generic.en: It smells kind of pepper-y.

fishsticks.en: What you see is what you get. Sticks of fish.

normal.trans: 把另一个宝石放进那里！

generic.en: Let's turn it back on!

healingsalve.en: It burns! But, where's the fire?
healingsalve.trans: 它烧着了！但是火在哪里？

marbletree.en: The worst kind of tree. The non-flammable kind.
marbletree.trans: 世上最糟糕的树，居然不能燃烧。

quagmire_park_fountain.en: A fountain with no water. Maybe that's a metaphor?
quagmire_park_fountain.trans: 没有水的喷泉。也许是个隐喻？

waterplant_planter.en: Do I really want to grow more of these things?
waterplant_planter.trans: 我真的想种植更多的这东西吗？

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: Can you imagine how great that would look if it was on fire?
carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 你能想象如果它着火了会有多壮观吗？

mutator_healer.en: Eww, there's legs sticking out of it!

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: Aw come on, I've got to set it up myself?
carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.trans: 拜托，还指望我亲自装啊？

shadow_beef_bell.en: I wonder if it will remember how it died.
shadow_beef_bell.trans: 我想知道它是否会记得它是怎么死的。

record_danger.en: There's something so nostalgic about the way it pops and crackles.
record_danger.trans: 它爆裂和噼啪作响的方式是如此怀旧。

smallmeat.en: This could be made better with FIRE!

drying_notmeat.en: How long does it take this stuff to dry?!

burnt.en: Maybe the fire wasn't the best drying method...
burnt.trans: 也许火不是把肉弄干的最好方法...

generic.en: Maybe I'll leave some meat here before I leave...
generic.trans: 也许我应该在离开前在这里放点肉……

beehat.en: This will keep the pokeys off of me.
beehat.trans: 这可以防止那些蜇人的蜜蜂接近我。

handpillow_steelwool.en: The worst pillow ever. I can't wait to hit someone with it!
handpillow_steelwool.trans: 有史以来最糟糕的枕头。我迫不及待地想用它来打人！

lunarfrog.en: Ew, ew, ew!! Too many eyes!!

winter_ornamentgorge.en: So cute I don't even wanna burn it.
winter_ornamentgorge.trans: 真可爱，我甚至舍不得烧掉它了。

yotp_food2.en: Nah. I'll feed it to something.

nonslipgrit.en: What for? I have the reflexes of a cat!
nonslipgrit.trans: 要这个干嘛？我反应快得像猫！

yotp_food3.en: A little snack to fill my belly.
yotp_food3.trans: 一点零食，可以用来填填我的肚子。

slingshot_handle_silk.en: That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning.
slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 那小孩对打弹弓的热爱简直都赶上我对纵火的痴迷了。

kitcoon_yot.trans: 你不仅个子小，而且吱吱作响。

boat_rotator_kit.en: Fiiiine, I'll put the stupid rudder on the stupid boat.
boat_rotator_kit.trans: 好吧，那就让我把傻傻的转向舵安在傻傻的船上。

sculpture_bishophead.en: Gross. I don't think that was supposed to come off.
sculpture_bishophead.trans: 恶心，那个不应该掉下来吧。

quagmire_coin2.en: I can probably buy something good with this.
quagmire_coin2.trans: 也许我可以用这个买点什么好东西。

monkeyqueen.en: Being in charge looks like a pretty easy job.
monkeyqueen.trans: 做负责人看起来是个相当容易的工作。

quagmire_coin4.en: Guess that thing liked what we gave it.
quagmire_coin4.trans: 我猜它喜欢我们给它的东西。

wagpunk_floor_kit.en: Why didn't he just find a bigger island?
wagpunk_floor_kit.trans: 他干嘛不直接找个大点的岛？

brokenhorn_follower.en: Ha! You look kinda dumb without your horn.
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 哈！你没了角看起来有点笨！

follower.en: Yeah, that's right! You work for ME now!
follower.trans: 对，没错！你现在给我打工了！

brokenhorn.en: Not so tough without your horn, are you?
brokenhorn.trans: 没了角就没那么凶了，对吧？

generic.en: Geez, look at the nose on that thing!
generic.trans: 天啊，看看那东西的鼻子！

fem_puppet.en: She looks scared half to death.
fem_puppet.trans: 她看起来已经被吓得半死。

unwritten.en: I could doodle something rude here.
unwritten.trans: 我可以在这弄些粗鲁的涂鸦。

burnt.en: It said "Don't play with matches", but the "Don't" is crossed out now.
burnt.trans: 它说“不要玩火柴”，但现在“不要”被划掉了。

generic.en: Less reading! More burning!

flowersalad.en: I'd rather a bowl of flames.

construction_plans.en: I'd rather burn things down than build them up.
construction_plans.trans: 我宁愿把东西烧掉，也不愿意把它们建起来。

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: A gym-shaped pile of potential kindling.
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 健身房的样子，有燃烧潜质。

steeringwheel.en: Check out how fast I can spin it!!

mast_item.en: You can't call it "sailing" if you don't have a sail.

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: A nice, scale-shaped pile of potential kindling.
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 长着秤的样子，有燃烧潜质。

acorn_sapling.en: You'll be a real tree soon.
acorn_sapling.trans: 你很快就会长成一棵真正的树的。

record_main.en: There's something so nostalgic about the way it pops and crackles.
record_main.trans: 它爆裂和噼啪作响的方式是如此怀旧。

barnacle.en: Ew, it came from the water.

lureplant.en: I bet a quick fire would take care of this.
lureplant.trans: 我打赌一把火就可以解决它。

polishcookie.en: Yup, I'll be having ten more of those.

drumstick.en: Bang on the drum all day!

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: How am I supposed to burn it when it's in the water?
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 它在水里，我该如何烧掉它？

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: It's fun to watch OTHER people fall on their butts.
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 还是看其他人一屁股摔在地上好玩。

mask_mirrorhat.trans: 让人起鸡皮疙瘩的面具。

merm_tool.en: It'd be handy if it wasn't so badly made.
merm_tool.trans: 做工太粗糙了，不然得话还是有点用的。

support_pillar_scaffold.en: Hmm. That looks suspiciously like work.

has_item_light.en: Hey is this thing broken? It's not even showing the weight!
has_item_light.trans: 嘿，这东西是坏了吗？连重量都没显示出来!

generic.en: Oooh, that basket looks flammable!
generic.trans: 噢，那个篮子看起来很好烧！

quagmire_trader_merm2.en: Nice hat. Are you selling that, too?
quagmire_trader_merm2.trans: 帽子挺漂亮的。那个也是卖的吗？

tillweedsalve.en: I guess that weed was good for something.
tillweedsalve.trans: 看来那杂草还是有点用场的。

archive_orchestrina_main.en: It won't burn? Well, I'm out of ideas.
archive_orchestrina_main.trans: 烧不着吗？那我可没主意了。

hermitcrabtea_petals.en: This stuff takes the edge off.
hermitcrabtea_petals.trans: 这东西能让人没那么炸毛。

watertree_pillar.en: The bigger the tree, the more there is to burn.
watertree_pillar.trans: 树越大，可以烧的东西就越多。

generic.en: I bet we could eat that.

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.en: It's made of some kind of jerk rock I can't burn.
multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 它是由某种无法燃烧的混蛋岩石做成的。

pomegranate_oversized.en: I bet it looks super gross inside!
pomegranate_oversized.trans: 我敢打赌，它里面看起来超级恶心！

woodcarvedhat.en: Oooh, what a flammable- I mean, fancy hat!
woodcarvedhat.trans: 哦，多么易燃啊——我是说，漂亮的帽子！

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: Can somebody else put it together for me?
carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.trans: 有没有人帮我装这个啊？

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: If only it shot flaming teeth.
houndstooth_blowpipe.trans: 要是射出燃烧的牙齿就好了。

brush.trans: 它闻起来像头发烧焦的味道。

sentryward.en: Pfft. It'll burn like the rest.
sentryward.trans: 啐，它会像剩下的一样燃烧起来。

hot.en: Is there such a thing as too much fire?

generic.en: Arise, my phoenix!

long.en: How long is this going to take?

spoiled_food.trans: 至少它仍然是可以燃烧的。

reviving.en: Do I even have to say it?

generic.en: Shall I do the honors?

sleep.trans: 它射出又大又臭的石头。

generic.en: It flings big stinkin' rocks.
generic.trans: 它射出又大又臭的石头。

critter_puppy.en: Hah, you don't even know you're smelly.
critter_puppy.trans: 哈，你甚至都不知道自己发臭了。

moonrocknugget.trans: 对我来说只是另一块石头。

skeleton_notplayer.en: Nasty! Who left their smelly old skeleton here?
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 真恶心！是谁把臭烘烘的老骨头留在这里的？

boat_bumper_shell.trans: 啊哈，没有什么比贝壳更坚固的了。

quagmire_salt.en: I need a pinch or two on all my food.
quagmire_salt.trans: 在我的所有食物上都要撒一点儿。

drumstick_cooked.en: Hmm... Satisfy hunger, or bang on the drum?
drumstick_cooked.trans: 嗯...填饱肚子呢还是用它来敲鼓？

wendy_resurrectiongrave.en: Does it work if you've been cremated?
wendy_resurrectiongrave.trans: 如果火化了，这还能用吗？

pepper.en: Good. These are the hot ones.

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: Ever considered making your ammo a little more flammable?
slingshotammo_moonglass.trans: 有没有考虑过让你的弹药更易燃一点？

walking_stick.en: That'll make a nice poker stick.
walking_stick.trans: 这将成为一根漂亮的烧火棍。

furtuft.en: Black and white and fuzzy all over!
furtuft.trans: 黑白色的毛皮，上面全是毛！

perd.en: Evil bird! Get away from those yummy berries!
perd.trans: 臭鸟！别靠近那些美味的浆果！

construction1.en: Uuuugh, why can't that old guy just build this thing himself?
construction1.trans: 呃，为什么那个老家伙不自己造？

construction2.en: I guess I could just burn it and be done with it, but now I'm kinda curious...
construction2.trans: 我是可以一把火烧了它，可是我就是好奇它造好是什么样子……

generic.en: Great! So what does it do?

chesspiece_beequeen.en: Took the sting out of her stinger.

idle.en: Nothing left to find, I guess.

generic.en: Point the way!

batnosehat.en: Is that even a real hat?

saddle_race.en: Was it worth it? I think it was worth it.

walkingplank_ancient.en: So, who are we gonna make walk it?
walkingplank_ancient.trans: 咱们逼谁走这个东西呢？

moonrockcrater.en: Great. A rock with a hole in it.
moonrockcrater.trans: 太棒了。里面有个洞的岩石。

generic.en: Gross!

gingerbreadhouse.en: I almost don't want to burn this one.
gingerbreadhouse.trans: 我都有点舍不得烧它了。

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: You know, I don't think I'm that hungry after all.

quagmire_altar_statue1.en: Haha! Look at this dumb goat statue.
quagmire_altar_statue1.trans: 哈哈！瞧这傻乎乎的山羊雕塑。

merm_toolshed.en: What a nice, flammable-looking tool shed!
merm_toolshed.trans: 既漂亮又易燃的工具棚！

shadow_forge_kit.en: I have to put it together myself?

generic.en: Doesn't it feel nice to be back in one piece?
generic.trans: 又变完整了，是不是感觉很好啊？

unhappy.en: There's gonna be tremors in our future.
unhappy.trans: 我们将来应该会感受到震动。

generic.en: What do you want?!

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: Looks like I'll have to put a few of these together to make anything worthwhile.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 看来我得把这些东西拼凑起来才会有价值。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: Looks like I'll have to put a few of these together to make anything worthwhile.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 看来我得把这些东西拼凑起来才会有价值。

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: I'd wear it if I felt like hitting stuff.
lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.trans: 我想敲打什么时候就会戴它。

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: Looks like I'll have to put a few of these together to make anything worthwhile.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 看来我得把这些东西拼凑起来才会有价值。

wx78_moduleremover.en: Let me try... hold still, WX!

goldenpickaxe.en: It won't light rocks on fire, but at least it's shiny.
goldenpickaxe.trans: 虽然它没法让石头着火，但至少它会闪闪发光。

inactive.trans: 看上去不像是能燃烧的。太无趣了。

handpillow_kelp.en: Ew, this pillow's full of wet junk!
handpillow_kelp.trans: 恶，这枕头里全是湿的垃圾！

quagmire_seedpacket.en: Aw...I won't know what these are until I plant them.
quagmire_seedpacket.trans: 啊啊啊...我必须把它们种出来了才知道它们是什么。

trap.en: It's a bit passive aggressive, but it'll work.
trap.trans: 虽然有点被动，但有用就行。

ruinshat.en: It seems like there's something flowing through it.
ruinshat.trans: 似乎有什么东西在其中流动。

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: Someone should probably check if it's flammable. I volunteer!
ghostlyelixir_shield.trans: 该有人检查检查它是不是可燃的。我主动报名！

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: A gym-shaped pile of potential kindling.
yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.trans: 健身房的样子，有燃烧潜质。

mosquitobomb.en: What an itchy way to go.

generic.en: Gross. This tree is sick all over.
generic.trans: 恶心。这棵树已经病入膏肓了。

acidcovered.en: I should check if it will still burn.
acidcovered.trans: 我应该检查一下它还不能烧起来。

generic.en: Light'em up!

halloweenpotion_fire_fx.en: I didn't think it was possible to make fire better.

nightlight.trans: 像火焰一样，不过是紫色的！

twigs.en: A bunch of small twigs. Good for fires, among other things.
twigs.trans: 一堆小树枝。和其他东西一样，也是很好的燃料。

yotb.en: Hey judge! Get a load of this!

generic.en: You and Bernie will get along great!
generic.trans: 你和伯尼会相处得很好！

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: Ever considered making your ammo a little more flammable?
slingshotammo_gelblob.trans: 有没有考虑过让你的弹药更易燃一点？

deck_of_cards.en: If it's not a full deck, at least we have kindling.
deck_of_cards.trans: 不怕这副牌不齐，拿来烧火也是可以的。

atrium_key.en: The horns make it really easy to turn.
atrium_key.trans: 这些角方便别人转动它。

balloonvest.en: Squeak-squeak-squeak! Ha ha where's Maxwell, this'll drive him crazy!
balloonvest.trans: 吱吱吱！哈哈，麦斯威尔呢，他听到肯定要疯掉！

line_1.en: It's got a picture of some gross looking people.
line_1.trans: 这是一些粗野的人的图片。

line_2.en: Can't tell what that was a picture of.
line_2.trans: 不能告诉我图片里是什么吗。

line_5.en: It's just a picture of a city.
line_5.trans: 这只是一张城市的图片。

line_3.en: I think someone spilled ink on this picture.
line_3.trans: 我觉得有人把墨溅到图片上了。

line_4.en: Oh, gross! The people're losing their skin in this one!
line_4.trans: 哦，好恶心！这张图片里，人们正在失去他们的皮肤！

cooldown.trans: 我会在另一个时间回来的。

charging.trans: 发生了一些奇怪的事情。

off.en: Why would anyone want to live down here?
off.trans: 为什么会有人想住在那下面？

quagmire_mermhouse.en: That's what passes for a village around here, I guess.
quagmire_mermhouse.trans: 我猜就是这个东西被人们误看成附近的一个村子。

generic.en: I love a warm glow.

asparagus_cooked.en: Not so chewy now, are you?

generic.en: Wood! So flammable! Hooray!
generic.trans: 木头！容易燃烧的木头！太好了！

spider_repellent.en: Well it might not work, but at least it makes noise!
spider_repellent.trans: 好吧，虽然可能不起作用，但至少能制造噪音！

generic.en: It looks cold out here. I bet it wants a fire.
generic.trans: 它看起来好冷。我猜它肯定想烤火。

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: I guess I'd be cranky too if I was woken up from the Big Sleep.
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 我想，如果我从“长眠”中被吵醒，我也会很暴躁。

carnival_vest_b.en: Just don't wear that too close to an open flame. Or do... heh heh.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 穿着时不要太靠近明火。其实也可以的……嘿嘿。

waxpaper.en: Heh, we rubbed a bunch of paper in beeswax.
waxpaper.trans: 嘿，我们给一堆纸涂了蜜蜡。

merm_lunar.en: I feel like it's staring straight through me.
merm_lunar.trans: 我感觉它直勾勾地盯着我，像是要把我看穿一样。

emberlight.en: I made that. No big deal.
emberlight.trans: 我做出来的。没什么大不了。

growing.en: Okay, hear me out... what if I tried burning it?
growing.trans: 来，听我说说……我把它烧了怎么样。

mined_out.en: Someone got all the salt already.

generic.en: Huh. That's... weird.

book_bees.en: "Rule one: don't set beehives on fire"? This book's stupid!
book_bees.trans: “规则一：不要放火烧蜂巢”？这本书太蠢了！

chopped.en: One less tree in the world.

generic.en: Die in a fire!

burnt.en: I wish it was still burning.

generic.en: Weird.

quagmire_turnip_seeds.en: It's just a bunch of seeds.

archive_lockbox.en: Great. We turned on the mysterious thing and got another mysterious thing.
archive_lockbox.trans: 这下好了。我们打开了一个神秘的东西，结果又出来了另外一个神秘的东西。

carnival_vest_a.en: Flaming red, just how I like it!

ghost.en: What happened? Did you fall out of a tree?
ghost.trans: 发生了什么事？你从树上掉下来了吗？

attacker.en: Careful, I think it's rabid!
attacker.trans: 小心点，我觉得它有狂犬病！

reviver.en: You're pretty smart for a stinky monkey.
reviver.trans: 你虽然只是一只臭猴子，但你相当聪明。

generic.en: I swear this monkey's following me.
generic.trans: 我发誓这只猴子在跟踪我。

wx78module_maxhealth.en: Hey WX, when are you gonna install a flamethrower?
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 我说WX，你啥时候装火焰喷射器啊？

generic.en: They're not so different from the pigs back at our place.
generic.trans: 它们跟我们家那边的猪没多大区别。

wagstaff_mutations_note.en: Looks important. I'll burn it later.
wagstaff_mutations_note.trans: 看起来很重要。我一会儿就烧掉它。

mask_queenhat.trans: 让人起鸡皮疙瘩的面具。

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: It's not moving anymore. Thanks, fire!
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 它不会再动了。感谢你，火焰！

quagmire_rubble_chimney.en: What's a chimney without a fireplace?
quagmire_rubble_chimney.trans: 没有壁炉的烟囱，算什么？

yotb_post_item.en: Here's an idea - instead of building it I just set it on fire!
yotb_post_item.trans: 我有个点子——干脆别造了，一把火烧了算了。

inspectself.en: Why didn't anyone tell me I had ashes on my face?
inspectself.trans: 怎么没有人告诉我我脸上有灰呢？

klaus.en: A lump of coal would be really useful, actually!
klaus.trans: 事实上，一块煤炭真的会很有用！

glassed.en: I feel like it's staring at me.

night_new.en: A new moon! Great, I hated the old one!

rat.en: Ha! I could watch this all day.

goatmilk.trans: 它被电给弄得不纯了。真讨厌。

record_balatro.en: This song is kind of mesmerizing.

chesspiece_bearger.trans: 那些是一些尖利的牙齿。

veggie_oversized_rotten.en: A big pile of stinky mush.

ghost.en: I better get a heart for %s.

attacker.en: Why, %s... that fire in your eyes!

generic.en: Hi %s!

beardhair.trans: 整理下你的长毛，朋友！啊呸！

seastack.en: It's just a big boring sea rock.
seastack.trans: 海里一块无聊的大石头。

mandrake.en: Why did this plant have a face?
mandrake.trans: 为什么这植物长着一张脸？

type2.en: She hasn't put her face on for the day yet.
type2.trans: 她今天还没有换上伪装。

type1.en: Yikes. I'd cover that up too if I were her.
type1.trans: 呀！如果我是她，我还会把它盖起来。

generic.en: It's an okay statue, I guess.
generic.trans: 我猜这是一个不错的雕像。

potatosouffle.en: MY stuff never comes out looking like THIS!

held.en: Out of the ground, into the fire.

cutstone.trans: 完全是四四方方的，看着真舒服。

alterguardian_phase2spike.en: Ugh, get these things out of my way!
alterguardian_phase2spike.trans: 呃，别让这些东西挡了我的路！

critter_glomling.en: Aww, I could just squish your gross lil face!
critter_glomling.trans: 噢，我可以挤扁你恶心的小脸！

saltbox.en: It'll keep my stuff from rotting, for a little while.
saltbox.trans: 可以让我的东西不腐烂，效果不长。

ghostlyelixir_revive.en: Someone should probably check if it's flammable. I volunteer!
ghostlyelixir_revive.trans: 该有人检查检查它是不是可燃的。我主动报名！

icecream.en: Well, soooometimes cold things are okay.
icecream.trans: 嗯，有时候冷的东西也挺好的。

generic.en: That will definitely burn.

walkingplank.en: So, who are we gonna make walk it?
walkingplank.trans: 咱们逼谁走这个东西呢？

fishtacos.trans: 真是方便好拿的鱼肉玉米卷。

merm_tool_upgraded.en: It'd be handy if it wasn't so badly made.
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 做工太粗糙了，不然得话还是有点用的。

held.en: Not so smart now, are you?

generic.en: I think it's waiting for me to die.

oceanfishingbobber_canary.en: How am I supposed to burn it when it's in the water?
oceanfishingbobber_canary.trans: 它在水里，我该如何烧掉它？

winter_ornamentforge.en: I should toast this over an open fire.
winter_ornamentforge.trans: 我要把它放在篝火上烤。

cane.en: It's way easier to cover ground with this!
cane.trans: 有了这个开溜容易多了！

generic.en: Ready for picking!

barren.en: Did I say you could stop growing?!
barren.trans: 我说过你可以停止生长吗？！

generic.en: It's a bunch of water.

empty.en: It's a bunch of dirt.

sword_lunarplant.en: It's okay, but now I really want a fire sword.
sword_lunarplant.trans: 是还可以，不过我现在好想要一把火焰剑。

pepper_seeds.en: It's just a bunch of seeds.

yotb.en: Hey judge! Get a load of this!

generic.en: You and Bernie will get along great!
generic.trans: 你和伯尼会相处得很好！

maxwelllight.en: These are no fun. They light themselves.
maxwelllight.trans: 一点都不好玩。它们可以自己把自己点亮。

wall_dreadstone.en: Couldn't we have made walls out of literally anything else?
wall_dreadstone.trans: 用什么砌墙不好非得用它？

voidclothhat.en: You never know who might really be hiding under that hood.
voidclothhat.trans: 你永远都不知道兜帽罩着的是谁的脸。

bird_mutant.en: It looks like it wants to take a bite out of me.
bird_mutant.trans: 它看起来像是想咬我一口。

opalstaff.en: Gotta hold it with my sleeve so my hands don't get cold.
opalstaff.trans: 必须用袖子兜住它，这样我的双手就不会变凉了。

carnivalfood_corntea.en: It keeps getting stuck in my teeth.
carnivalfood_corntea.trans: 它一直卡在我的牙齿里。

jammypreserves.en: Wham, bam, jam! Thank you, ma'am.

pumpkin_oversized.en: I could stick the biggest candle in there! It'll be great!
pumpkin_oversized.trans: 我可以把最大的蜡烛插在里面！一定很棒！

generic.en: A horse with no butt.

struggle.en: I don't wanna see what comes outta that!
struggle.trans: 我不想看到从那出来的东西！

snowball_item.en: Who needs a snowball to the face?

shadowthrall_hands.en: What has two hands and no feet? Whatever that thing is.
shadowthrall_hands.trans: 什么东西有两只手，没有脚？就那个玩意儿。

lunarrift_portal.en: Uh... is that supposed to be here?

slingshotmodkit.en: That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning.
slingshotmodkit.trans: 那小孩对打弹弓的热爱简直都赶上我对纵火的痴迷了。

low.en: This fire is small and boring.

generic.en: I could watch it for hours.
generic.trans: 我可以几个小时一直盯着它看。

high.trans: 烧吧！烧得再旺点！再蓝点！

low.en: This fire is small and boring.

generic.en: I like fire of all kinds.
generic.trans: 不管什么类型的火我都喜欢。

generic.en: That could totally catch on fire.

glasscutter.en: Haha, this thing could take an arm off!
glasscutter.trans: 哈哈，这个东西可以砍下一条胳膊！

dry.en: Is it supposed to be that dry?

balanced.en: I guess it looks okay? For a pile of rotten dirt?
balanced.trans: 它看起来很不错？反正都是些烂泥？

generic.en: Ew, why do we have this?

cattoy_mouse.en: I don't think I've ever actually seen a normal mouse around here.
cattoy_mouse.trans: 我从来没有在这里见过一只正常的老鼠。

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: I guess building some bumpers is better than sinking.
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 我想建造一些保险杠总比沉没好。

lit.en: See? Things just look better when they're on fire.
lit.trans: 看到了吗？东西着火之后会更美。

generic.en: Aww, you want something to burn, don't you?
generic.trans: 哇，你想要烧点东西，是吗？

generic.en: Aww, you want something to burn, don't you?
generic.trans: 哇，你想要烧点东西，是吗？

quagmire_goatmum.trans: 她的眼睛让我毛骨悚然。

generic.en: Aww, you want something to burn, don't you?
generic.trans: 哇，你想要烧点东西，是吗？

battlesong_shadowaligned.trans: 快看，多么高级的小火花！

dumbbell.en: Quit making stuff I can't burn!
dumbbell.trans: 别再做我烧不掉的东西了！

charging.en: I can poof stuff away too! Let me just get my lighter!
charging.trans: 我也能把东西噗噗掉！我这就去拿打火机！

charged.en: I can poof stuff away too! Let me just get my lighter!
charged.trans: 我也能把东西噗噗掉！我这就去拿打火机！

generic.en: I can poof stuff away too! Let me just get my lighter!
generic.trans: 我也能把东西噗噗掉！我这就去拿打火机！

grotto_pool_small.en: Ugh, this whole place is damp and gross! I hate it!
grotto_pool_small.trans: 呃，这整个地方既潮湿又恶心！我讨厌它！

generic.en: Alright, now give!

empty.en: What do you want, horsehead?

warm.en: No flame, no real heat... what fun is that?
warm.trans: 既没有火焰，也没有真正的热量...有什么好玩的？

generic.en: A fire would liven this thing up!

mapscroll.en: Nothing's on it? I can burn it then, right?
mapscroll.trans: 上面什么也没有？那么我可烧了它了，对吗？

mutator_spitter.en: Eww, there's legs sticking out of it!

redlantern.en: Anything with a fire in it is okay by me.
redlantern.trans: 任何有火焰的东西对我来说都是可以的。

on.en: I wish you'd shut your lid and stop putting out fires.
on.trans: 真希望你赶紧关上盖子，不要再把火扑灭了。

wx78module_maxsanity.en: Hey WX, when are you gonna install a flamethrower?
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 我说WX，你啥时候装火焰喷射器啊？

boatpatch.en: Fixing stuff is boring, but necessary.
boatpatch.trans: 修东西挺无聊，但是很有必要。

quagmire_portal.en: I'm just gonna keep jumping through portals til I figure out a way home.
quagmire_portal.trans: 我就一直穿越传送门，直到我找到回家的路为止。

wrong_type.en: Oops, wrong food. Burn the mistake.
wrong_type.trans: 哎呀，错的食物。把那个错误给烧了。

has_food.en: Looks so good I almost don't want to burn it.
has_food.trans: 看着这么丰盛，我都有点不想放火烧掉了。

burnt.en: Now I'm really feeling the holiday spirit!
burnt.trans: 现在我才算感受到了节日精神了！

generic.en: Are we having company?

bathbomb.en: I still don't want to take a bath.

quagmire_grill_item.en: Ugh, I guess I should set it up.

voidcloth_scythe.en: Farming just got a bit less boring.
voidcloth_scythe.trans: 种地总算可以没那么无聊了。

spring.en: Stupid rabbits must be stuck down there.
spring.trans: 那些蠢兔子肯定被困在下面了。

generic.en: Stupid rabbits. Come out so I can eat you.
generic.trans: 蠢兔子，快出来，我要吃了你。

quagmire_merm_cart2.en: I'd burn it, but I need the things in there.
quagmire_merm_cart2.trans: 我倒是想烧了它，可我需要里面的东西。

generic.en: Do starfish usually have so many teeth?
generic.trans: 所有海星都有这么多牙么？

quagmire_merm_cart1.en: There's a lot of stuff to burn in there.
quagmire_merm_cart1.trans: 这里有好多可以烧的东西。

ghost.en: Just tell me whatcha need and I'll get it for you. Heheh!
ghost.trans: 告诉我你需要什么，然后我给你拿。呵呵呵！

murderer.en: Your actions speak louder than words! Murderer!
murderer.trans: 你的行动比语言响亮！杀人凶手！

attacker.en: That mime punch was really convincing! Haha, ow!
attacker.trans: 那一下闷声攻击真令人服气！哈哈，噢！

generic.en: Hi %s!

ready.en: She won't be mad if I steal a liiiittle honey, right?
ready.trans: 我偷点蜂蜜她应该不会发火吧？

fullhoney.en: She won't be mad if I steal a liiiittle honey, right?
fullhoney.trans: 我偷点蜂蜜她应该不会发火吧？

generic.en: Wow, her bees are about as friendly as she is.
generic.trans: 哇，她的蜜蜂几乎跟她一样友好。

cabbagerolls.en: Yeah, I can roll with these.
cabbagerolls.trans: 好的，我可以风卷残云的吃掉它们。

burning.en: Heh... wasn't sure if that would work.

generic.en: Who cares about weighing some dumb fish?
generic.trans: 谁会在乎称什么愚蠢的鱼？

lobsterbisque.en: I'm gonna eat this entire thing!

koalefant_carcass.en: It's dead. Shall I do the honors?
koalefant_carcass.trans: 它死了。不然我来处理一下？

yotr_food4.en: I'll just pop those in my mouth, quick as a bunny.
yotr_food4.trans: 我学兔子一口就吞下去。

bugnet.en: Doesn't fit over Webber's big head.
bugnet.trans: 不适合韦伯那个大脑袋。

yotr_food3.en: Eww, it looks like a big jelly eyeball.
yotr_food3.trans: 呃，看起来像是一只果冻做的大眼睛。

palmcone_sapling.en: One day you'll grow big enough to be worth cutting down for firewood.
palmcone_sapling.trans: 等你有天长大了，就可以被砍掉当柴烧了。

slingshotammo_slow.en: Ever considered making your ammo a little more flammable?
slingshotammo_slow.trans: 有没有考虑过让你的弹药更易燃一点？

broken_forgeditem.trans: 好吧，看起来已经被弄坏了。

monkey.en: Joke's on you! I can burn this poo.
monkey.trans: 开个玩笑！我可以点燃这坨便便。

waiting.en: At least it's not looking at me anymore.

generic.en: It's rude to stare.
generic.trans: 盯着人看是很没礼貌的。

fruitflyfruit.en: Now I'm the one giving the orders! To fruit flies, but still.
fruitflyfruit.trans: 现在轮到我发号施令了！虽然是些果蝇，但好过没有。

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: Bernie's cuddlier than a hairy old pillow.
bodypillow_beefalowool.trans: 伯尼抱起来比一个长毛的老枕头舒服多了。

deer_antler.trans: 这是个又大又怪异的鹿角。

merm_prince.en: What makes that guy so special?
merm_prince.trans: 那家伙有什么特别之处？

lucy.en: We could be good friends, you and I.
lucy.trans: 我们会成为好朋友的，你和我。

whip.en: This means I'm the boss now.
whip.trans: 这意味着我现在是老大了。

frogfishbowl.en: Woah, that's a ton of frogs.
frogfishbowl.trans: 哇，这大概有一吨的青蛙了吧。

walkingplank_grass.en: So, who are we gonna make walk it?
walkingplank_grass.trans: 咱们逼谁走这个东西呢？

valid.trans: 我可以感觉到魔力的存在！

ghostflower.trans: 好极了。有一朵奇怪的花。

firestarter.en: Didn't know you had it in you, %s.

ghost.en: Did your heart give out, %s? Just kidding! Hey!
ghost.trans: %s，你的心用尽了吗？开玩笑而已！嘿！

murderer.en: Time for a good ol' book burnin'! Murderer!
murderer.trans: 烧好书的时候到了！杀人凶手！

attacker.en: Your bun too tight, %s?

generic.en: Hi %s!

quagmire_fern.en: I can take my pick of them.

waterplant_bomb.en: Okay, I'm sorry I called you dumb!
waterplant_bomb.trans: 好吧，对不起，我不该叫你笨蛋！

melted.en: As useless as water ever was.

generic.en: I don't think there's any way it'd burn.
generic.trans: 我觉得无论用什么方法都不可能把它点燃。

crabking_claw.en: Keep your claws off my boat!
crabking_claw.trans: 你的钳子离我的船远点！

wortox_reviver.en: I guess it makes dying less inconvenient.
wortox_reviver.trans: 这下死起来都不方便了。

bodypillow_kelp.en: Ew, this pillow's full of wet junk!
bodypillow_kelp.trans: 恶，这枕头里全是湿的垃圾！

featherfan.en: I dunno... it could put out some fires...

recharging.en: It's not doing much right now.

generic.en: Why worry about the past or future? It'll all go up in flames eventually.
generic.trans: 为什么要去担心过去和将来？反正最后都是一把火烧得精光。

mast_malbatross_item.en: You can really make a sail out of anything.
mast_malbatross_item.trans: 真是用什么都能做帆啊。

handpillow_petals.en: I guess that's one use for flowers.

scanning.en: I can't decide if it's cute or creepy.

hunting.en: I can't decide if it's cute or creepy.

generic.en: I can't decide if it's cute or creepy.
I don't want to go in that gross hole!
generic.trans: 我不想进去那个讨厌的洞！

open.en: I hope there's lava down there somewhere.
open.trans: 我希望下面某个地方会有熔岩。

full.en: There's too many people down there.

spear_wathgrithr.en: I prefer a flame, but to each her own.
spear_wathgrithr.trans: 我更喜欢火焰，不过萝卜青菜，各有所爱。

ghostlyelixir_attack.en: Someone should probably check if it's flammable. I volunteer!
ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 该有人检查检查它是不是可燃的。我主动报名！

nightmarepie.en: I'm sure he wouldn't mind if I stole a nibble.
nightmarepie.trans: 我偷偷吃一口他应该不会介意。

mutator_water.en: Give one to Wilson, I'm sure he'd loooove to try it! Heheh.
mutator_water.trans: 给威尔逊一个吧，我相信他一定很想试试！嘿嘿。

rocky.en: We don't have much in common.
rocky.trans: 我们可没有多少共同点。

rocks.en: What's the point of collecting these again?
rocks.trans: 又收集这些有什么意义？

archive_moon_statue.en: Huh. These look different from the other statues down here.
archive_moon_statue.trans: 哈。这些跟其他雕塑看起来不一样。

guano.trans: 它烧起来和普通粪便没什么区别。

kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 你不仅个子小，而且吱吱作响。

butter.en: Tasty, and just a little bit insecty.
butter.trans: 很美味，只是有点昆虫的味道。

molehill.en: It burrows away from the sun's skyfire. Unnatural.
molehill.trans: 它挖洞逃避烈日。违背自然规律。

saltlick_improved.en: I'm so glad I'm not a beefalo.
saltlick_improved.trans: 幸亏我不是头皮弗娄牛。

support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.en: Cool. Wonder if it will burn.
support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.trans: 酷。不知道它是否会燃烧。

dug_marsh_bush.en: What's the matter, got no dirt?

lots_of_flowers.en: I guess it's kind of pretty...

some_flowers.en: You're doing it wrong, those flowers aren't dry enough to burn!
some_flowers.trans: 你的方法不对，这些花不够干，烧不着！

generic.en: A pyre would've been more fun.

quagmire_swampig.trans: 这张脸真的称不上好看。

cookedsmallmeat.en: Gonna need a lot of appetizers to survive out here!
cookedsmallmeat.trans: 需要很多开胃菜，才能在这里存活下去。

dock_kit.en: It'll be nice to cover up the water with some nice, flammable wood.
dock_kit.trans: 用一些漂亮的、易燃的木头来遮住水面是极好的。

durian_cooked.en: Yuck, it smells just as bad cooked!
durian_cooked.trans: 呸，闻起来就像是东西煮坏了一样！

mast_malbatross.en: Just think how much cooler it'd look if I set it on fire.
mast_malbatross.trans: 我要是把它点着了，它看起来会酷的多。

fig.trans: 看起来像是老年人吃的水果。

wobster_den.en: Come on out little guys, I just want to roast ya!
wobster_den.trans: 来吧，小家伙们，让姐姐烤了你们！

surfnturf.en: Ugh. This is old person food!

amulet.en: I have no idea what it does, but it feels good to wear it!
amulet.trans: 我不知道它是什么，但戴着它不错！

generic.en: They're pretty cute.

withered.en: All dried out. Primed for fire!
withered.trans: 全部干枯了。正好用来点火！

generic.en: Mmmmm. Berries.

sculpture_rooknose.en: Ha, falling to pieces. Rookie mistake.
sculpture_rooknose.trans: 哈，摔成碎片了。菜鸟才会犯的错误。

refined_dust.en: Great. What am I supposed to do with this stuff?
refined_dust.trans: 很好。我该怎么处理这些东西呢？

magician_chest.en: What do you think would happen if I threw a lit match inside?
magician_chest.trans: 如果我往里面扔一根点燃的火柴，你认为会发生什么？

shadowthrall_mouth.en: Somehow I don't trust that smile.
shadowthrall_mouth.trans: 不知怎的，我不相信那个微笑。

purpleamulet.trans: 这科技是不是有点走偏了？

fence_gate_item.en: No point just leaving it on the ground.
fence_gate_item.trans: 把它留在地面上没有什么意义。

walkingplank_yotd.en: I'm not setting foot on that, no matter how good it looks!
walkingplank_yotd.trans: 不管它看起来有多好，我都不会踏上去！

quagmire_wheat.en: How on earth do you eat this?

mushroomhat.en: I don't like having my head messed with.

minifan.en: No fun, making me exercise to stay cool!
minifan.trans: 不好玩，让我锻炼怎么保持冷酷！

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: Wow, I always wanted dirt vision... said nobody ever.
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 哇，我一直都想透视泥土……谁稀罕。

wounded.en: You don't look so hot, tree.

generic.en: Aw! It's impervious to fire.
A little door to nowhere special.
generic.trans: 这小门不通往任何地方。

thulecitebugnet.en: I should try this one on Webber.
thulecitebugnet.trans: 我应该拿这个去韦伯身上试试。

winter_ornamentlight.en: It's like a fire, but without the burning!

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: Maybe I could have some fun with this...
boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.trans: 我可以拿这个好好玩玩……

lava_pond_rock.trans: 哦，太好了，另一块臭石头！

hermit_pearl.en: Don't worry grams, it's safe with me!
hermit_pearl.trans: 别担心，老奶奶，它在我这很安全！

pickaxe_lunarplant.en: The dumb plant still gets to hit stuff. It's what it would've wanted.
pickaxe_lunarplant.trans: 愚蠢的植物仍然可以打东西。跟它活着的时候一个德性。

wall_moonrock_item.en: I guess I could carry it.

generic.en: Even the babies are ugly.

book_light_upgraded.en: Stop trying to get me to read!
book_light_upgraded.trans: 不要再试图让我读书了！

spider_whistle.en: Nu-uh, I'm not putting that thing anywhere near my face.
spider_whistle.trans: 不——就不，我可不会让那个东西靠近我的脸蛋。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: This lure's making a face at me...
oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.trans: 这个鱼饵在冲我做鬼脸……

burning.en: That's what we were supposed to do, right?
burning.trans: 那是我们该做的事，对吧？

generic.en: That looks WAY better!

empty.en: It's missing something. Like fire.

crimson.en: Oh yuck, it looks all gross inside!
crimson.trans: 哦，呸，里面看起来很恶心！

waiting_for_dark.en: Oooh, maybe it's getting ready to explode!

I guess I could show everyone where I've been.

generic.en: You and Bernie will get along great!

generic.en: You and Bernie will get along great!
generic.trans: 你和伯尼会相处得很好！

burnt.trans: 至少它燃烧时发出过明亮的火光！

burnt.en: There's no learning from that now.

burnt.en: Now it's dark and not very powerful.

generic.en: A dark and powerful energy radiates from it.
generic.trans: 它散发着黑暗而强大的能量。

burnt.en: Double, double toil and... oh. It's burned.

lantern.en: Fire is not meant to be contained like this!

rage.en: Woah! It's packing a punch now!

generic.trans: 它长满肮脏的肉瘤和蘑菇。

attacker.en: You're a real little terror, aren't you?

mermking.en: Are you supposed to be important or something?

pirate_flag_pole.en: It would look a lot cooler with flames around it.
pirate_flag_pole.trans: 如果周围有火焰，它看起来会更酷。

chesspiece_muse.en: Ewww, she doesn't have a head!

w_radio.en: Ten seconds to make it work before I burn it.
w_radio.trans: 给你十秒钟弄好它，不然我就一把火烧了。

growing.trans: 加把劲，土堆。给我提供食物！

generic.en: Sigh. It's a pile of dirt.

reviving.en: Do I even have to say it?

generic.en: Shall I do the honors?
What are you looking at, pumpkin head?

slingshot_handle_jelly.en: That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning.
slingshot_handle_jelly.trans: 那小孩对打弹弓的热爱简直都赶上我对纵火的痴迷了。

rock_petrified_tree.en: How am I supposed to burn it now?

bodypillow_steelwool.en: Pretty sure this is the worst pillow ever.

kitcoon_marsh.trans: 你不仅个子小，而且吱吱作响。

recharging.en: It's not doing much right now.

generic.en: Why worry about the past or future? It'll all go up in flames eventually.
generic.trans: 为什么要去担心过去和将来？反正最后都是一把火烧得精光。

generic.en: I've uh... never actually been to a carnival before. Do I give it something?
generic.trans: 我呃……从来没到嘉年华玩过。我是要给它个什么东西吗？

broken.en: I need to fix Bernie up.

generic.en: My childhood buddy - Bernie!

oar_monkey.en: Hey, maybe rowing can be fun after all!
oar_monkey.trans: 嘿，也许划船真有那么点意思！

moon_altar_rock_glass.en: Something inside is calling for me.

monkey_mediumhat.en: I took that dumb monkey's hat.
monkey_mediumhat.trans: 我抢了那只笨猴子的帽子。

occupied.en: Honestly, anything I do will be an improvement.
occupied.trans: 哼，我不管什么都能做好。

generic.en: Come on beefalo, it's dress-up time!

chopped.en: Not so spiky now, are you?
chopped.trans: 现在没那么扎手了，对吧？

burnt.en: I wish it was still burning.

generic.en: It looks dangerous!

potatotornado.en: Woah, I didn't know potatoes came in that shape!
potatotornado.trans: 哇，我还不知道土豆有这个形态！

ghost.en: I better get a heart for %s.

goose.en: Ha! You're a hoot, %s. Or is it a honk?
goose.trans: 哈！你是咕咕叫%s。还是吱吱叫?

attacker.en: You're only fueling the fire, %s!

gooseghost.en: Don't be such a down-er, I'll get you a heart.
gooseghost.trans: 别这么低沉，我会给你弄颗心脏的。

reviver.en: Is there maple syrup in your veins, %s? You're so sweet!
reviver.trans: %s，你的血液里有枫糖浆吗？你太甜了！

generic.en: Hi %s!

bundlewrap.en: We could hide some gross things, I guess.
bundlewrap.trans: 我们可以把一些糟糕的东西藏起来，我猜。

eggplant_oversized.en: What am I supposed to do with all this eggplant?!
eggplant_oversized.trans: 我拿这么多茄子做什么？！

beemine.en: Bees inside. Should've put some fire in there for good measure.
beemine.trans: 里面有蜜蜂。应该再往那里放点火。

alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.en: What do we do? There's nothing to burn!

mushgnome.trans: 咦，它把孢子丢的到处都是！

generic.en: What's the big deal?

mutatedwarg.en: Don't worry, you're still gonna go down in flames.
mutatedwarg.trans: 别担心，你仍然会燃烧着倒下。

sculpture_knighthead.en: Great, now we've irritated some marble crime boss!
sculpture_knighthead.trans: 这下好了，我们激怒了大理石犯罪案的幕后黑手！

generic.en: That looks so flammable!

oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.en: Ha! Fish are so dumb- Ow! Man, that's sharp.

oceantree.en: Heh, you thought you'd be safe from my lighter out here on the water?
oceantree.trans: 呵，你以为在这里的水面上，你会免受我打火机的影响吗？

trinket_43.en: Yeesh. I can feel the nostalgia dripping off it.
trinket_43.trans: 呀，我可以感觉到怀旧的气息迎面而来。

molebat.en: Haha gross! I just saw it eat something through its nose!
molebat.trans: 哈哈真恶心！我刚才看到它用鼻子在吃东西！

trinket_45.en: It's got kind of a dumb face, huh?
trinket_45.trans: 它有一张愚笨的面孔，是吧？

slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.en: Ever considered making your ammo a little more flammable?
slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.trans: 有没有考虑过让你的弹药更易燃一点？

trinket_46.en: I never take my pigtails out anyway.
trinket_46.trans: 反正我不会露出我的辫子。

mermarmorhat.en: Who wants to wear a stupid merm hat anyway?
mermarmorhat.trans: 谁想要戴这顶愚蠢的鱼人帽子啊？

chesspiece_wormboss.trans: 我希望它得一回消化不良。

handpillow_beefalowool.en: Bernie's cuddlier than a hairy old pillow.
handpillow_beefalowool.trans: 伯尼抱起来比一个长毛的老枕头舒服多了。

ghostlyelixir_speed.en: Someone should probably check if it's flammable. I volunteer!
ghostlyelixir_speed.trans: 该有人检查检查它是不是可燃的。我主动报名！

voidcloth_kit.en: Do I look like the kind of person who fixes things? Ugh, fiiiiine...
voidcloth_kit.trans: 我看起来像那种会修理东西的人吗？呃，行吧……

chesspiece_claywarg.en: It doesn't look so tough now.
chesspiece_claywarg.trans: 它现在看起来没那么厉害了。

turf_dragonfly.en: My lighter doesn't work on it.

level_3.en: Alright, I'm bored of decorating. Moving on.
level_3.trans: 行了，我装潢够了。换下一个吧。

generic.en: Hm, the ground around it does looks kind of empty...
generic.trans: 嗯，它周围的地面看起来确实有点空……

level_2.en: I think those weird birds like the decorations.
level_2.trans: 我觉得怪鸟们应该喜欢这些装饰品。

trinket_30.en: Probably the most boring game ever invented.
trinket_30.trans: 可能是发明出来的最无聊的游戏了。

trinket_32.trans: 只是一个又大又愚蠢的球。

trinket_31.en: Probably the most boring game ever invented.
trinket_31.trans: 可能是发明出来的最无聊的游戏了。

generic.en: Bouncy goat.

merm_armory.en: I can't look inside? But that just makes me want to even more!
merm_armory.trans: 我不能朝里面看吗？但这只会让我更想去看！

cooking_short.en: The fire is doing its thing!

cooking_long.en: The fire still has quite a bit of work to do.

done.trans: 火可以让一切东西变得更好。嗯！

burnt.en: At least it went out in a blaze of glory.
burnt.trans: 至少它是在荣耀的火焰中毁灭的。

empty.en: Fire's the best ancient invention there is!
empty.trans: 火焰就是最好的远古发明！

palmcone_seed.trans: 还没有完全成为一棵树。

trinket_38.en: It makes stuff look small no matter which way I turn it.
trinket_38.trans: 无论我怎么转动，它都会让东西看上去更小。

oceanvine_cocoon.en: Ewww look at it just dangling up there!
oceanvine_cocoon.trans: 咦，看啊，它在半空里吊着！

pepper_cooked.en: First rule of vegetables: fire makes it better.
pepper_cooked.trans: 蔬菜的第一条规则：火让它变得更好。

trinket_33.en: Ewww! Who would ever wear that!

mosquitomermsalve.en: This reminds me of a nightmare I had once.
mosquitomermsalve.trans: 这让我想起曾经做过的一个噩梦。

trinket_35.en: Hey Wes! Dare you to drink the last bit!
trinket_35.trans: 嘿，韦斯！你敢喝最后一口吗！

generic.en: I haven't got any crumbs for you.

carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.en: A little door to nowhere special.
carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.trans: 这小门不通往任何地方。

beequeen.en: No amount of honey is worth THAT!
beequeen.trans: 即使是再多的蜂蜜也值得！

high.trans: 烧吧！烧得再旺点！再蓝点！

low.en: This fire is small and boring. And blue.
low.trans: 火太小了，真无聊。而且还是蓝色的。

generic.en: I could watch it for hours, even though it's cold.
generic.trans: 即使它是冷的火，我也可以盯着它几个小时。

playing.en: Bounce that way! No, THAT way!!
playing.trans: 蹦到那边去！不，是那个方向！！！

generic.en: I've uh... never actually been to a carnival before. Do I give it something?
generic.trans: 我呃……从来没到嘉年华玩过。我是要给它个什么东西吗？

pigelitefighter4.en: Sure does like using those signs.

moon_tree_blossom.en: This would look even prettier if it was on fire.
moon_tree_blossom.trans: 要是着了火看起来就更酷了。

trinket_21.en: When I crank it Wes pretends to ride unicycle circles around me.
trinket_21.trans: 我转动曲柄的时候，韦斯假装在我周围骑独轮车。

trinket_20.en: This looks a little like a fire iron.
trinket_20.trans: 这看起来有点像个火炉用具。

rock_ice_melted.en: As useless as water ever was.

fence_junk.en: Not the prettiest fence in the world, but it works.
fence_junk.trans: 这不是世界上最漂亮的栅栏，但它能管用。

generic.en: A very very old chest.

trinket_27.en: I want to stick it in a fire!
trinket_27.trans: 我想把它放在火里烧了！

damaged.en: Blah, it's just spare parts at this point.
damaged.trans: 哼，现在就是堆零件而已。

generic.en: Get outta here, flying trashcans!

goldnugget.en: What should we spend it on??

trinket_29.trans: 象棋只适用于自大的笨蛋。

trinket_28.trans: 象棋只适用于自大的笨蛋。

trinket_23.en: It looks like it might melt in a fire.
trinket_23.trans: 似乎它可以在火里熔掉。

trinket_22.en: I could use this as a very long fuse...
trinket_22.trans: 我能将这个当成一个很长的导火索……

trinket_25.en: I stuck one down Wolfgang's unitard when he wasn't looking. Haha.
trinket_25.trans: 我趁沃尔夫冈没注意的时候粘了一个在他的弹力紧身衣上面。哈哈。

trinket_24.en: I don't want Ms. Wickerbottom to be sad. Let's burn it!
trinket_24.trans: 我不想让薇克巴顿女士难过。让我们烧了它！

ivy_snare.en: Get outta here you stupid weed!
ivy_snare.trans: 滚开，你这颗愚蠢的杂草！

icestaff2.en: I prefer the opposite of this.
icestaff2.trans: 我更喜欢跟它完全相反的东西。

resurrectionstone.en: I'll touch it when I'm good and ready.
resurrectionstone.trans: 当我完全准备好了，我会触摸它。

generic.en: Spines! My weakness! How did you know?
generic.trans: 尖刺！这是我的弱点！你是怎么知道的？

slingshotammo_thulecite.en: Ever considered making your ammo a little more flammable?
slingshotammo_thulecite.trans: 有没有考虑过让你的弹药更易燃一点？

monkeybarrel.trans: 多么棒的家，一下子就能烧起来。

firestaff.trans: 那绝对是我最喜爱的玩具。

trinket_10.en: Hey Maxwell, I think you dropped these!
trinket_10.trans: 嘿，麦斯威尔，这些是你掉的。

saddle_shadow.en: I could shoot a fire dart or two from there.
saddle_shadow.trans: 我可以从那里发射一两支火焰吹箭。

critterlab.en: Is there anything cute in there??
critterlab.trans: 那里面有什么可爱的东西吗？？

generic.en: Where's Pearl?

trinket_16.en: What is it with megalomaniacs and chess?
trinket_16.trans: 自大狂加上象棋，会是什么？

chesspiece_beefalo.en: Hey, they got his good side!

trinket_15.en: What is it with megalomaniacs and chess?
trinket_15.trans: 自大狂加上象棋，会是什么？

trinket_18.en: I bet Wigfrid would be into this.
trinket_18.trans: 我肯定薇格弗德会喜欢这个。

trinket_17.en: Metal bends when it gets nice and hot.
trinket_17.trans: 金属精密发热的时候会弯曲。

trinket_12.en: I bet Wilson would enjoy dissecting this.
trinket_12.trans: 我肯定威尔逊会想要解剖这个。

trinket_11.en: Ooh, I wonder if he has a flamethrower!
trinket_11.trans: 哦，不知道他有没有火焰喷射器！

trinket_14.en: They put a bird on it.
trinket_14.trans: 他们在它身上放了一只鸟。

boomerang.en: It's not the most exciting weapon.
boomerang.trans: 它不是最让人兴奋的武器。

rose.en: I'd like to burn this flower in particular.

generic.en: I don't have time to waste on flowers.
generic.trans: 我可没有时间浪费在花朵上。

trinket_13.en: She looks like she was forged in flame.
trinket_13.trans: 她看起来像是经过烈火锻造的。

quagmire_garlic.en: It's just a couple cloves of garlic.

ghostlyelixir_retaliation.en: Someone should probably check if it's flammable. I volunteer!
ghostlyelixir_retaliation.trans: 该有人检查检查它是不是可燃的。我主动报名！

lavaarena_heavyblade.en: No way I can use that!

support_pillar_complete.en: It's nice not having to worry about rocks falling on my head.
support_pillar_complete.trans: 不用担心石头掉到头上真是太好了。

firestarter.en: You've got a lot of guts for a plant. I like that!
firestarter.trans: 好一颗胆大包天的植物。我喜欢！

ghost.en: I think %s needs some help.

murderer.en: I'm gonna burn you like tinder!

attacker.en: Hey! Keep those creepin' vines to yourself!

generic.en: Hi %s!

slingshot_band_tentacle.en: That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning.
slingshot_band_tentacle.trans: 那小孩对打弹弓的热爱简直都赶上我对纵火的痴迷了。

deadlyfeast.en: Fire didn't cure this dish of being nasty.
deadlyfeast.trans: 连火也治不了这盘菜的卑鄙本性。

bluemooneye.en: That's not an eyeball! It's a rock!
bluemooneye.trans: 那不是一个眼球！它是岩石！

occupied.en: You sure you want to sit there? That chair may spontaneously combust.
occupied.trans: 你确定要坐在那里？那把椅子可能会自燃。

generic.en: That will definitely burn.

scrapbook_page.en: Another page for the emergency kindling supply- I mean scrapbook.
scrapbook_page.trans: 又有一页纸可以用来提供给火堆应急——我是说图鉴。

generic.en: It would be better if it measured fire.
generic.trans: 如果它能测量火的话会更好。

burnt.en: If you'd measured fire, maybe you woulda been prepared!
burnt.trans: 如果你能测量火的话，也许你就能早做准备，不会被烧了！

generic.en: I want to set it on fire.

antchovies.en: They taste super salty and gross.
antchovies.trans: 他们的味道很咸，有点恶心。

wagboss_robot_possessed.en: I knew it was a killer robot!
wagboss_robot_possessed.trans: 我就知道它是个机器杀手！

generic.en: I still think we should torch it.
generic.trans: 我还是觉得我们应该烧掉它。

empty.en: I vote for torching it.

mask_princesshat.en: I dunno... I kinda like it.

1.en: She's a smelly, weird little dog. I like her!
1.trans: 她是一只又臭又怪的小狗。我喜欢她！

2.en: She's a smelly, weird little dog. I like her!
2.trans: 她是一只又臭又怪的小狗。我喜欢她！

pumpkinpie.en: Yep, I'm eating this whole thing.

archive_centipede_husk.en: Just a bunch of broken parts.

crumbs.en: Haha. That little guy is losing his parts.
crumbs.trans: 哈哈。那个小家伙零件掉了一地。

carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.en: Aw come on, I've got to set it up myself?
carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.trans: 拜托，还指望我亲自装啊？

tentacle_garden.trans: 我听到有轻微的挖土的声音。

oceanfishingbobber_ball.en: How am I supposed to burn it when it's in the water?
oceanfishingbobber_ball.trans: 它在水里，我该如何烧掉它？

shovel_lunarplant.en: Alright, time to find some stuff to dig up!
shovel_lunarplant.trans: 好了，是时候找些东西来挖了！

quagmire_hoe.en: You mean I gotta do work?

cooldown.en: I only wish it had a more fiery explosion.
cooldown.trans: 我只希望它能猛烈的爆炸。

generic.en: Let's liven things up a bit!

reviving.en: Do I even have to say it?

generic.en: Shall I do the honors?

meatballs.en: Meat made into spheres and improved with fire.
meatballs.trans: 将肉做成丸子，用火烹饪一下就成了美味。

yotb.en: Hey judge! Get a load of this!

generic.en: You and Bernie will get along great!
generic.trans: 你和伯尼会相处得很好！

picked.trans: 这只是根芦苇残枝而已。

generic.en: It's a burnable clump of reeds.
generic.trans: 这是一丛可以烧着的芦苇。

goldenaxe.en: It won't light trees on fire, but at least it's shiny.
goldenaxe.trans: 虽然它没法让树着火，但至少它会闪闪发光。

livingtree_root.en: It's a stick. But I can't even set it on fire.
livingtree_root.trans: 它是根棍子。可是我竟然烧不着它。

monsterlasagna.en: Noodles, meat and clumps of hair. Nasty.
monsterlasagna.trans: 面条、肉和一团一团的毛发。真恶心。

burnt.en: There's no learning from that now.
burnt.trans: 现在再也没法从那里学习新东西了。

generic.en: Even I don't know everything... yet.
generic.trans: 即使有些东西我不知道...这也只是暂时的。

burning.en: Frankly, I'm surprised these soggy guys burn so well.
burning.trans: 说实话，我很惊讶这些湿漉漉的家伙能烧得这么好。

generic.en: Ew! Burn it!
Looks just as flammable as the old ones.
generic.trans: 看起来跟老房子一样容易着火。

burnt.en: I feel a little bad... actually, no I don't.
burnt.trans: 我有点愧疚……其实，一点也不。

golden_farm_hoe.en: It won't help fires grow, but at least it's shiny.
golden_farm_hoe.trans: 虽然不能帮助火苗生长，但至少它闪着光。

mosquitosack.en: Blood must bubble in currents muggy and thick.
mosquitosack.trans: 在沉闷厚重的气流中，血液必须沸腾起来。

lunar_forge.en: What gives? That little fire doesn't even feel warm!
lunar_forge.trans: 什么情况？那个小火苗连点温度都没有！

rabbitkingspear.en: The original owner was a jerk.

gargoyle_hound.en: Lookit this big dumb lawn ornament!
gargoyle_hound.trans: 看看这个又大又蠢的草坪装饰品！

generic.en: It'll be a nice place to put my stuff while I'm out burning.
generic.trans: 我去外面放火的时候，可以把我的东西放在这里面。

generic.en: Let's just smash it up.

molebathill.en: Ew, is it sleeping in its own snot?
molebathill.trans: 咦，它就睡在自己的鼻涕里啊？

wall_dreadstone_item.en: Uuuuugh, building is so much wooork...
wall_dreadstone_item.trans: 呃呃呃，建东西要把人累死了……

turnip.trans: 哈哈，真恶心，我讨厌大萝卜。

ghost.en: Hey %s, did you know the heart's a muscle?
ghost.trans: 嘿%s，你知道心脏也是一块肌肉吗？

attacker.en: %s! Take it easy, big guy!

reviver.en: Woah! %s ripped a spirit straight out of the afterlife!
reviver.trans: 哇哈！%s从来生撕下了一个灵魂！

generic.en: Hi %s!

boat_bumper_yotd.en: Alright, a boat with teeth is kinda cool.
boat_bumper_yotd.trans: 好吧，长牙的船还是挺酷的。

mossling.trans: 它的羽毛看上去破破烂烂的。

ghostlyelixir_lunar.en: Someone should probably check if it's flammable. I volunteer!
ghostlyelixir_lunar.trans: 该有人检查检查它是不是可燃的。我主动报名！

opalpreciousgem.en: It's glittery and mesmerizing, like a fire!
opalpreciousgem.trans: 它像火焰一样闪烁着，令人着迷！

battlesong_instant_revive.trans: 快看，多么高级的小火花！

picked.en: Maybe it will return some day.
picked.trans: 也许有一天它会再长回来。

generic.en: Stupid mushroom.
I've uh... never actually been to a carnival before. Do I give it something?
generic.trans: 我呃……从来没到嘉年华玩过。我是要给它个什么东西吗？

armordragonfly.trans: 耶！让火来得更猛烈些吧！！！

blowdart_sleep.en: Tranquilized things are easier to light on fire.
blowdart_sleep.trans: 被催眠的东西容易点火。

generic.en: Nobody's home.
A little door to nowhere special.
generic.trans: 这小门不通往任何地方。

teleportato_ring.en: This is too precious to burn!
teleportato_ring.trans: 这么珍贵的东西不能烧啊！

fig_cooked.en: As usual, fire made it better.
fig_cooked.trans: 像以往一样，火让它变得更美妙了。

mermhat.en: Yuck, who'd want a face like that?
mermhat.trans: 呀，谁会把这东西戴在头上？

generic.en: I say light her up. Just in case.
generic.trans: 依我说烧了她吧。以防万一。

mutatedbird.en: What are you looking at, weird bird?

quagmire_park_urn.en: Cremation is the only way to do it.

wagstaff_npc_wagpunk.en: That's right, old man. Move along.

kitcoon_savanna.trans: 你不仅个子小，而且吱吱作响。

trunkvest_winter.en: Not as warm as a good fire, but still pretty good!
trunkvest_winter.trans: 虽然不像火焰那样温暖，但还不错！

chesspiece_daywalker.en: How come jerks always seem to get statues?
chesspiece_daywalker.trans: 为什么混蛋似乎总能被做成雕像？

lucky_goldnugget.en: I don't think I'm supposed to spend this.
lucky_goldnugget.trans: 我认为我不应该来浪费这东西。

baconeggs.en: The yellow mucus-y part is gross, but the bacon is great!
baconeggs.trans: 溏心蛋黄部分有点恶心，但是培根非常美味！

oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.en: Ha! Fish are so dumb- Ow! Man, that's sharp.

generic.en: Let's get you cremated.

announce_ticoon_dead.trans: 很好，我现在做什么好呢？

invalid.en: How would I even eat that!

generic.en: Yum!

announce_carrat_start_race.trans: 好吧，咱们把奖品赢到手！

announce_eyeofterror_flyback.en: Did you come back just to get BURNED?
announce_eyeofterror_flyback.trans: 你回来就是想被烧掉吗？

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.en: Guess we were a second too late to this one.
announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.trans: 看来我们终究是晚了一秒。

announce_carrat_error_walking.en: Um, can we maybe go a bit faster?!
announce_carrat_error_walking.trans: 额，我们能跑的快一点吗？！

announce_nohungersiesta.en: I can't take a siesta while my tummy is grumbling!
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 肚子饿得咕咕叫时，我没法午休！

2.trans: 今天有没有觉得自己很易燃啊？

3.en: So... plant stuff... man, this is boring.

4.en: Anything interesting going on lately? Right, nope. Because you're a plant.
4.trans: 最近有什么有趣的事吗？对，没有。因为你只是植物。

5.en: Hey, rustle twice if you want to take a closer look at my lighter!
5.trans: 嘿，如果你想仔细看看我的打火机，就沙沙响两声吧!

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.en: Boooo, I lost track of him in the mud.
announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.trans: 见鬼，它的踪迹在这堆土里消失不见了。

announce_eating_not_feasting.en: Fiiiiiine, I'll share with everyone else.
announce_eating_not_feasting.trans: 好吧，我就跟他们分享分享。

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: What is it? Kit's stuck in a well?
announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.trans: 这是怎么了？浣猫卡在井里了？

idol_med.en: Don't worry, I'll get you out.
idol_med.trans: 别担心, 我会把你弄出来。

seed_med.en: Don't worry, I'll get you out.
seed_med.trans: 别担心, 我会把你弄出来。

glass_med.en: Don't worry, I'll get you out.
glass_med.trans: 别担心, 我会把你弄出来。

announce_mosquitos.trans: 滚开，你这个吸血的混蛋！

announce_worms.en: I do NOT wanna see what made that sound!
announce_worms.trans: 我不想看到那个声音是什么东西发出来的！

announce_nodangersleep.en: No time for sleep, there's fighting to do!
announce_nodangersleep.trans: 没时间睡觉，我必须得战斗！
